title: 🇵🇱 Poland will declassify data on all military aid to Ukraine 👥...

description: 🇵🇱 Poland will declassify data on all military aid to Ukraine 👥 Minister of Defense of Poland Władysław Kosiniak-Kamysh instructed to declassify data on military aid to Ukraine for the years 2022-2026. The decision was made after consultation with Prime Minister Donald Tusk. In addition, the Polish Military Counterintelligence Service (SKW) will investigate the disclosure of state secrets. 🖋 The process of transferring equipment to Ukraine...
description_en: 🇵🇱 Poland will declassify data on all military aid to Ukraine 👥 Minister of Defense of Poland Władysław Kosiniak-Kamysh instructed to declassify data on military aid to Ukraine for the years 2022-2026. The decision was made after consultation with Prime Minister Donald Tusk. In addition, the Polish Military Counterintelligence Service (SKW) will investigate the disclosure of state secrets. 🖋 The process of transferring equipment to Ukraine...
description_uk: 🇵🇱 Польща розсекретить дані про всю військову допомогу Україні 👥 Міністр оборони Польщі Владислав Косіняк-Камиш доручив розсекретити дані про військову допомогу Україні за 2022–2026 роки. Рішення ухвалене після консультації з прем’єр-міністром Дональдом Туском. Крім того, польська Служба військової контррозвідки (SKW) розслідуватиме розкриття державної таємниці. 🖋 Процес передачі техніки Україні...

title: UNIAN is launching a new project - "Unbreakable Business" - in which...

description: UNIAN is launching a new project - "Unbreakable Business" - in which our special correspondent Yevgeny Cherevko will talk about Ukrainian businessmen working despite the problems and cataclysms caused by the war - up to the destruction of production facilities and resources. At the same time, many indomitable Ukrainian businessmen still do not forget to support the military, veterans and immigrants,...
description_en: UNIAN is launching a new project - "Unbreakable Business" - in which our special correspondent Yevgeny Cherevko will talk about Ukrainian businessmen working despite the problems and cataclysms caused by the war - up to the destruction of production facilities and resources. At the same time, many indomitable Ukrainian businessmen still do not forget to support the military, veterans and immigrants,...
description_uk: УНІАН запускает новый проект - «Незламний Бізнес» - в котором наш специальный корреспондент Евгений Черевко расскажет про украинских предпринимателей, работающих несмотря на причиненные войной проблемы и катаклизмы - вплоть до уничтожения производственных мощностей и ресурсов. При этом, многие несокрушимые украинские бизнесмены еще и не забывают поддерживать военных, ветеранов и переселенцев,...

title: ⛽️Belarusian gasoline went to Russia in record volumes. But there is...
title_en: ⛽️Belarusian gasoline went to Russia in record volumes. But there is...
title_uk: ⛽️Білоруський бензин пішов до Росії в рекордних обсягах. Але є...
description: ⛽️Belarusian gasoline went to Russia in record volumes. But there is a nuance. In the first 25 days of June, Belarus delivered 141,000 tons of gasoline to the Russian Federation, which is 2.4 times more than in the whole of May. A year ago, deliveries in general were almost imperceptible - only about a thousand tons per June. In order to help the Russian market, Minsk even redirected the fuel that it previously sent to the countries of Central Asia. True, there is...
description_en: ⛽️Belarusian gasoline went to Russia in record volumes. But there is a nuance. In the first 25 days of June, Belarus delivered 141,000 tons of gasoline to the Russian Federation, which is 2.4 times more than in the whole of May. A year ago, deliveries in general were almost imperceptible - only about a thousand tons per June. In order to help the Russian market, Minsk even redirected the fuel that it previously sent to the countries of Central Asia. True, there is...
description_uk: ⛽️Белорусский бензин пошел в россию рекордными объемами. Но есть нюанс За первые 25 дней июня Беларусь поставила в рф 141 тысячу тонн бензина — это в 2,4 раза больше, чем за весь май. Год назад поставки вообще были почти незаметными — всего около тысячи тонн за июнь. Чтобы помочь российскому рынку, Минск даже перенаправил топливо, которое ранее отправлял в страны Центральной Азии. Правда, есть...

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_en: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_uk: Виявлено запуск балістичної ракети
description: Spoke with the Prime Minister of Sweden. I am grateful to Ulf for his support and for a clear position regarding the Russian war against Ukraine, against our people. The key is, of course, air defense. Now we can see that the Russians are betting on ballistic strikes, combined strikes, jet "shahedis". Defending against this is the key to denying Russia the ability to drag out the war. Of course, we talked with Ulf about things that can...
description_en: Spoke with the Prime Minister of Sweden. I am grateful to Ulf for his support and for a clear position regarding the Russian war against Ukraine, against our people. The key is, of course, air defense. Now we can see that the Russians are betting on ballistic strikes, combined strikes, jet "shahedis". Defending against this is the key to denying Russia the ability to drag out the war. Of course, we talked with Ulf about things that can...
description_uk: Говорив з Премʼєр-міністром Швеції. Вдячний Ульфу за підтримку і за чітку позицію щодо російської війни проти України, проти наших людей. Ключове – це, звісно, ППО. Зараз ми бачимо, що росіяни роблять ставку на удари балістикою, комбіновані удари, реактивні «шахеди». Захист від цього – це ключ, щоб позбавити Росію можливості затягувати війну. Звісно, ми проговорили з Ульфом речі, які можна...

title: Explosions reported
title_en: Explosions reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про вибухи
description: 🤯A man detonated a grenade during a document check in the Odessa region. The police report that they stopped the moped driver for violating the traffic rules, and during the check they found out that he is in the SZH. After that, the man took out a grenade and began to threaten, and after a few moments an explosion thundered. Two policemen and the offender himself were injured.
description_en: 🤯A man detonated a grenade during a document check in the Odessa region. The police report that they stopped the moped driver for violating the traffic rules, and during the check they found out that he is in the SZH. After that, the man took out a grenade and began to threaten, and after a few moments an explosion thundered. Two policemen and the offender himself were injured.
description_uk: 🤯Мужик подорвал гранату во время проверки документов в Одесской области Полицейские сообщают, что остановили водителя мопеда за нарушение ПДД, а во время проверки выяснили, что он находится в СЗЧ. После этого мужчина достал гранату и начал угрожать, а уже через несколько мгновений прогремел взрыв. Двое полицейских и сам нарушитель получили ранения.
